case_title: ANDREW DIOKNO VS. JUAN PAULO OZAETA VICTORINO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,074.00 FILED BY DIOKNO, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT OZAETA VICTORINO, JUAN PAULO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
